description: Deterministic ground-truth pack for po_pricing-backed aggregation questions. V2 expands the original 25-item set to 40 items across Q-DEMO-A/B/C/E/F, adding year-bounded, site-bounded, and fuzzy-part variants while preserving the v1 file for diff-comparison.

notes.quantity_rule: For order-volume and total-spend SQL, rows with NULL/0 qty use a conservative fallback of 1.0 so pricing-only purchase orders still count as one ordered unit.
notes.lead_time_rule: lead_time_days comes from chunk-derived purchase-order dates when present and can be backfilled from po_lifecycle order/receipt joins.
notes.replacement_cost_rule: Replacement-cost questions use the latest available unit-price row when a current dated row exists; YELLOW is tolerated when only historical average/max price can be recovered.

items.query: What are the top ordered parts?
items.query_text: What are the top ordered parts?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE part_number != '' GROUP BY part_number ORDER BY order_count DESC, total_qty DESC, part_number ASC LIMIT 5

items.query: What are the top ordered parts in NEXION?
items.query_text: What are the top ordered parts in NEXION?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE system = 'NEXION' AND part_number != '' GROUP BY part_number ORDER BY order_count DESC, total_qty DESC, part_number ASC LIMIT 5

items.query: Top 10 ordered parts in ISTO from 2023-2025
items.query_text: Top 10 ordered parts in ISTO from 2023-2025
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE system = 'ISTO' AND po_date != '' AND substr(po_date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2023' AND '2025' AND part_number != '' GROUP BY part_number ORDER BY order_count DESC, total_qty DESC, part_number ASC LIMIT 10

items.query: What are the top ordered parts in Guam from 2022-2025?
items.query_text: What are the top ordered parts in Guam from 2022-2025?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE site_token = 'guam' AND po_date != '' AND substr(po_date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2022' AND '2025' AND part_number != '' GROUP BY part_number ORDER BY order_count DESC, total_qty DESC, part_number ASC LIMIT 5
items.note: Coverage-dependent narrow site slice; RED is acceptable when no matched Guam pricing rows exist after populate.

items.query: Top 3 ordered parts in Djibouti in 2024
items.query_text: Top 3 ordered parts in Djibouti in 2024
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE site_token = 'djibouti' AND po_date != '' AND substr(po_date, 1, 4) = '2024' AND part_number != '' GROUP BY part_number ORDER BY order_count DESC, total_qty DESC, part_number ASC LIMIT 3
items.note: Coverage-dependent narrow site-year slice; RED is acceptable when no matched Djibouti pricing rows exist after populate.

items.query: Which parts had the longest lead time?
items.query_text: Which parts had the longest lead time?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, MAX(lead_time_days) AS max_lead_time_days, AVG(lead_time_days) AS avg_lead_time_days FROM po_pricing WHERE part_number != '' AND lead_time_days IS NOT NULL GROUP BY part_number ORDER BY max_lead_time_days DESC, avg_lead_time_days DESC, part_number ASC LIMIT 5

items.query: How much did we spend on ARC-4471?
items.query_text: How much did we spend on ARC-4471?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(unit_price, 0.0) * CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_spend, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE part_number = 'ARC-4471' AND unit_price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY part_number
items.note: Exact-part query; RED is acceptable when the requested part is not present in the populated slice.

items.query: How much did we spend on ARC-4471 in Guam?
items.query_text: How much did we spend on ARC-4471 in Guam?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(unit_price, 0.0) * CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_spend, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE part_number = 'ARC-4471' AND site_token = 'guam' AND unit_price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY part_number
items.note: Exact-part site query; RED is acceptable when the requested part/site pair is not present in the populated slice.

items.query: What is the cost of PS-909 in ISTO from 2023-2025?
items.query_text: What is the cost of PS-909 in ISTO from 2023-2025?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(unit_price, 0.0) * CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_spend, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE part_number = 'PS-909' AND system = 'ISTO' AND po_date != '' AND substr(po_date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2023' AND '2025' AND unit_price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY part_number
items.note: Exact-part system query; RED is acceptable when the requested part/system pair is not present in the populated slice.

items.query: What is the replacement cost for WR-200 in Guam?
items.query_text: What is the replacement cost for WR-200 in Guam?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, site_token, MAX(po_date) AS last_price_date, AVG(unit_price) AS avg_unit_price, MAX(unit_price) AS max_unit_price FROM po_pricing WHERE part_number = 'WR-200' AND site_token = 'guam' AND unit_price IS NOT NULL GROUP BY part_number, site_token
items.note: Replacement cost is an estimate; YELLOW is acceptable when only historical price statistics exist. RED is acceptable when the requested part/site pair is absent.

items.query_text: What is the replacement cost for ARC-4471 in NEXION in 2024-2025?

items.note: Replacement cost is an estimate; YELLOW is acceptable when only historical price statistics exist. RED is acceptable when the requested part/system slice is absent.

items.query: What are the top ordered ARC family parts in NEXION from 2022-2025?
items.query_text: What are the top ordered ARC family parts in NEXION from 2022-2025?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT part_number, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qty IS NULL OR qty <= 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE qty END), 0.0) AS total_qty FROM po_pricing WHERE system = 'NEXION' AND po_date != '' AND substr(po_date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2022' AND '2025' AND part_number LIKE 'ARC%' GROUP BY part_number ORDER BY order_count DESC, total_qty DESC, part_number ASC LIMIT 5
items.note: Fuzzy family query; RED is acceptable when no ARC-prefixed parts exist in the filtered slice.
